sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Dobro mišljenje o drugima je dio vjere».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Thinking well of others is part of faith».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ حُسْنَ النِّيَّةِ تُجَاهَ النَّاسِ صِفَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je dobra namjera prema ljudima lijepa osobina.
sentences.translationEn: This means that good intentions toward people is a fine quality.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَرُدَّ زَيْدٌ عَلَى رِسَالَتِهِ فَظَنَّتْ أَنَّهُ مَشْغُولٌ.
sentences.translation: Zejd joj nije odgovorio na poruku pa je mislila da je zauzet.
sentences.translationEn: Zaid did not reply to her message so she thought he was busy.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ رَدَّ وَاعْتَذَرَ لِأَنَّ هَاتِفَهُ كَانَ مُعَطَّلًا.
sentences.translation: Nakon dana je odgovorio i ispričao se jer mu je telefon bio pokvaren.
sentences.translationEn: After a day he replied and apologized because his phone was broken.
